scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,admin,backend -c cyan,magenta,yellow "npm run dev -w devinepremium-frontend" "npm run dev -w devinepremium-admin-dashboard" "npm run dev -w devinepremium-backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w devinepremium-frontend && npm run build -w devinepremium-admin-dashboard && npm run build -w devinepremium-backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w devinepremium-frontend && npm run lint -w devinepremium-admin-dashboard
